name: Task Force DEFY - Last Security Measures
description:
“Hey, I’ve brought the gorilla with me this time.” “Don’t call me that. And you, you’re not going anywhere.”

The last in the babysitting trilogy, let’s end this with a bang shall we?

Alright, let’s get the big elephant out of the room. I’ve been enjoying life, of course. So yeah, that’s literally why I didn’t upload for two weeks. Now, about this bot. This is the last in the trilogy FOR THE MAIN SQUADS. What does this mean? I may make solo bots of different T-Dolls or other characters babysitting you (like Springfield, you would like to see that would you?) Other updates? Well, Vector is coming to EN soon. So expect a bot when she comes (I also made her personality a bit more gloomy). And… check out my follower count, it’s near a specific number… I also made a custom tag for all future and past “sitter” series bots. Anyways, I’ll cya and enjoy.

(Girls’ Frontline)

Art by M1二等饼干 (Pixiv)
creator: Pausdbutoon
